plays.title: The Frog King
plays.description: The youngest princess loses her favorite plaything, a golden ball, in a deep well.

plays.title: Cat and Mouse in Partnership
plays.description: A cat and a mouse enter into a partnership.

plays.title: Our Lady's Child
plays.description: The Virgin Mary takes in a starving woodcutter's child and later punishes her secret disobedience.

plays.title: The Story of the Youth Who Went Forth to Learn What Fear Was
plays.description: An undaunted boy sets out into the world to learn what it means to shudder and fear.

plays.title: The Wolf and the Seven Young Kids
plays.description: A wicked wolf eats seven young kids, but the mother rescues them and drowns the wolf in a well.

plays.title: Faithful John
plays.description: A dying king entrusts his faithful servant John with the care of the young king.

plays.title: The Good Bargain
plays.description: A poor peasant drives his cow to market and sells it for a seemingly worthless promise.

plays.title: The Strange Musician
plays.description: A lonely musician travels through the forest and lures animals with his fiddle.

plays.title: The Twelve Brothers
plays.description: A king wishes to have his twelve sons killed if a daughter is born.

plays.title: The Pack of Ragamuffins
plays.description: A proud rooster and a hen go on a journey and cheat the innkeeper.

plays.title: Brother and Sister
plays.description: A little brother and sister flee from their wicked stepmother.

plays.title: Rapunzel
plays.description: A man steals rampion from the garden of a dreaded sorceress for his pregnant wife.

plays.title: The Three Little Men in the Wood
plays.description: A jealous stepmother drives her beautiful stepdaughter into the forest in the icy winter in a paper dress.

plays.title: The Three Spinners
plays.description: Three strange spinners help a lazy girl complete the queen's impossible spinning task.

plays.title: Hansel and Gretel
plays.description: Two siblings abandoned in the forest outsmart a wicked witch and return rich to their father.

plays.title: The Three Snake-Leaves
plays.description: A poor youth goes to war, triumphs through brave effort, and wins the princess as his wife.

plays.title: The White Snake
plays.description: A curious servant secretly eats of the king's covered dish, a white snake.

plays.title: Straw, Coal, and Bean
plays.description: In a kitchen, a straw, a glowing coal, and a bean escape death by fire.

plays.title: The Fisherman and His Wife
plays.description: A poor fisherman catches a speaking flounder, who reveals himself as a transformed prince.

plays.title: The Brave Little Tailor
plays.description: A little tailor slays seven flies on his jam bread and sets out into the world.

plays.title: Cinderella
plays.description: A pious, hardworking girl loses her mother and is mistreated by her stepmother.

plays.title: The Riddle
plays.description: A king's son travels into the world with his faithful servant and gets lost in a dark forest.

plays.title: The Mouse, the Bird, and the Sausage
plays.description: A mouse, a bird, and a sausage live in a happy household partnership.

plays.title: Mother Holle
plays.description: A widow favors her lazy daughter and forces her hardworking stepdaughter to work.

plays.title: The Seven Ravens
plays.description: An angry father curses his seven sons into ravens, whereupon their sister sets out to find them.

plays.title: Little Red Cap
plays.description: A wolf outwits Little Red Cap and devours her and her grandmother, until a hunter saves them both.

plays.title: The Town Musicians of Bremen
plays.description: Four old animals flee death and drive robbers from their house with a loud concert.

plays.title: The Singing Bone
plays.description: A man kills his brother, steals the credit for a wild boar, and is exposed years later by a singing horn.

plays.title: The Devil with the Three Golden Hairs
plays.description: A prophesied child of fortune escapes a king's plots and retrieves three golden hairs from the devil.

plays.title: The Louse and the Flea
plays.description: A brewing accident plunges household goods and nature into deep mourning and leads to a flood.

plays.title: The Girl Without Hands
plays.description: A mutilated girl flees the devil, and is saved and healed by God's grace and a loyal king.

plays.title: Clever Hans
plays.description: Hans takes all his mother's advice literally and destroys his courtship of Gretel.

plays.title: The Three Languages
plays.description: An outcast son learns the languages of animals, finds a treasure, and rises to pope by divine grace.

plays.title: Clever Elsie
plays.description: An allegedly clever bride loses herself in fears of catastrophe and forgets her own identity.

plays.title: The Tailor in Heaven
plays.description: A sinful tailor sneaks into heaven, sits on God's throne, and is banished for self-righteousness.

plays.title: The Wishing-Table
plays.description: Three brothers obtain magic gifts, are robbed by an innkeeper, and reclaim their rights with a cudgel.

plays.title: Thumbling
plays.description: A tiny but clever boy helps his father, escapes kidnappers and thieves, and is freed from a wolf's belly.

plays.title: The Wedding of Mrs. Fox
plays.description: A fake death, the courtship of many suitors, and a grand wedding in the house of widow Mrs Fox.

plays.title: The Six Swans
plays.description: In the robbers' cabin, on the night when the brothers name the price, the sister sets out to find them.

plays.title: One-Eye, Two-Eyes, and Three-Eyes
plays.description: A despised girl saves herself with a magic goat and a golden apple tree, and finds her happiness.
